name.zh: 品味之选 - 第七部分
name.en: Ideal For Someone With Taste - Part 7

description.zh:
还能再来一轮挑战吗？希望你做好了准备，你可得随身扛着不少重量呢。

有人跟我说他们管这玩意儿叫“猪”，管他呢…… M60 机枪——听着就够爽，一百发子弹打出去，够劲儿吧？它用的是 7.62x51mm NATO 弹，在塔科夫这地方表现特别出色，不过你大概早就知道了。

但我可不是让你端着它四处乱扫、见人就突突，不不不，你得一发一发地精准命中不同的身体部位。再爆几个头，打打胳膊和腿。而且你得在上面装一个 ELCAN Specter 镜。

等你搞定这些之后，得把这挺机枪藏到市中心某处，我倒是知道一个地方——还记得咱之前找到的那个杂物间吗？挨着停车场那个，没错，就是那儿。用来藏东西再合适不过了，你觉得呢？
完事儿之后从米拉大道撤离，我可以给你这把信号枪和一枚信号弹，免得狙击手朝你开枪。
description.en:
Still fit for another challenge? Hopefully you're prepared, you will carry a lot of weight around you.

Someone told me they called this thing "The Pig", whatever... M60 machine guns - Sounds like hundred rounds of fun, right? It uses 7.62x51mm NATO rounds, they perform fantastic here in Tarkov, but you likely know that already.

But I don't want you to just shoot around you and gun down anyone you see with automatic fire, no no, you need to precisely shoot others in certain limbs, one by one. Take out some targets with headshots too, and shoot their arms and legs. And you need an ELCAN Specter on it.

After you're done with that you gotta hide the machinegun somewhere in the city center, I might know a spot already - Remember the utility room we found a while ago? The one near the parking lot, yeah that one. Sounds like a perfect hiding place, what do you think?
Get out of there through Mira-Ave after you're done, I can give you this signal pistol and a flare so the snipers don't shoot you.
